name: Shearer School Bus Station Inc
principals: Richard R. Shearer (Board Member, founder's son - deceased Jan 2019); originally purchased Portales route from Shearer's father in 1988; current operations likely run by Pat Tivis Shearer / family or successor
districts_or_customers: Portales Municipal School District (Roosevelt County, NM); historical Floyd School District route
recent_news: Founder Richard 'Dickie' Shearer passed away January 2019; long-tenured family operation since the late 1970s/80s with succession question post-founder death.
fit_notes: Small single-yard family operator in eastern NM with strong succession signal post-founder death; very small (~15-bus) but clean NM tuck-in for Summit's regional footprint; revenue/scale below typical platform threshold.

name: Vickie A Cubbage Inc
districts_or_customers: Likely Carroll County Public Schools (Sykesville, MD area); Maryland uses owner-operator contractor model
recent_news: No M&A or material news found; Maryland MSBCA member ecosystem with several small family contractors; Carroll County added two new contractors (Palmerino, On the Town) in May 2024 indicating active contractor turnover.
fit_notes: Classic Maryland single-operator contractor; sub-scale (~8 buses) and eponymous - too small for standalone tuck-in but could roll up with other CCPS contractors; succession unclear without principal age data.

name: Precision Bus Solutions
districts_or_customers: Unknown; address 5272 Tractor Rd is a shared industrial lease property in north Toledo housing multiple logistics/freight tenants (PSC, CRB Logistics, Freight Rite)
recent_news: No school-bus-specific news; address appears to be a shared industrial park, raising question of whether this is an active student-transport operator vs. freight/logistics or repair shop. Could not confirm operating school bus contractor status.
fit_notes: Cannot verify as a true school-bus operator - shared industrial address with freight tenants suggests possible miscategorization. Recommend deprioritize pending direct phone verification.

name: World5 Inc Which Will Do Bus
districts_or_customers: Unknown; address 1616 Newton Ave is in Barrio Logan/southeast San Diego industrial corridor
recent_news: No web footprint found under 'World5 Inc' or 'World5 Will Do Bus' DBA. Unusual entity name suggests a holding-company structure with a fictitious business name for school bus service; no public website, phone listed as 'Not Available'.
fit_notes: Near-zero web presence and no working phone make this a low-priority tuck-in candidate without further CA SOS / FMCSA pull to confirm it is an active school-bus operator vs. dormant entity.

name: Elite School Svc
principals: Felipe Cesar Hernandez (CEO/CFO/Director); Rosa Maria Hernandez (Secretary)
districts_or_customers: Likely Arcadia USD and neighboring San Gabriel Valley districts (LA County); operates from 6 E Newman Ave, Arcadia
recent_news: Elite School Transit Inc was incorporated April 2017 as the operating entity alongside original 2007 Elite School Services; husband-and-wife Hernandez family operation. No M&A activity found.
fit_notes: Small Hispanic family-run SGV operator (~10 buses, $1-2.5M revenue); too small standalone but a clean fold-in to a larger LA County Summit platform yard. Owners likely active-career age (no succession trigger yet).
